title: Hindering, obstructing, or impersonating prohibited
doc_html:
§4620.  Hindering, obstructing, or impersonating prohibited

No one shall hinder or obstruct the department in any way in the performance of its official duties.  No one shall impersonate in any way the commissioner, his inspectors, or the director.

Acts 1992, No. 55, §1.
